decisions.rationale: Confirmed in Dashboard.tsx: ContinueOnboardingBanner renders inside the pre-results branch (!profile.results) while Bubble gates bTIpm on CurrentUser onboarding_completed_boolean.is_false. profile.onboardingCompleted is available from AUTH-05/userProfile but is not consulted. Edge case only — users with onboarding_completed=true but missing/null results would see the banner in React but not in Bubble. AC-2 names AUTH-05 signals and reviewer criteria_audit AC-2 passes; banner copy, bTIpm markers, and /onboarding CTA (FV-3/FV-4) are correct. Aligning visibility to !profile.onboardingCompleted is a one-line polish item that does not block API-01 or other downstream depends_on gates.

Confirmed in ServicesFloatingPanel.tsx line 51: bTJEO root uses hidden md:block, fully suppressing the panel below md. Bubble FloatingGroup bTJEO has no equivalent mobile-hide conditional. Named ui_ref bTJEO ui_evidence passes at desktop breakpoints with correct fixed bottom-right z-[60] positioning, RepeatingGroup_list_ styling, and pathenrollment1 binding (FV-5/FV-6). AC-3 scopes page-level FG semantics and enrollment listing — not explicit all-breakpoint visibility. PATHS-06-enrollment-floating-services-bar owns paths-page FG bTItS/bTItX, not dashboard bTJEO mobile parity. Responsive width/positioning polish can land with DS-01 or a later responsive pass.

Critique targets decompose metadata drift, not a code defect. Brownfield preflight maps legacy .vue paths to frontend/src/components/dashboard/*.tsx; CrisisSupportCard.tsx re-exports the shared module at frontend/src/components/crisis/CrisisSupportCard.tsx and Dashboard.tsx imports from @/components/crisis. Decompose target_files already list .tsx paths under components/dashboard/; AC prose .vue filenames are path-convention placeholders. Shared crisis tree avoids duplication and satisfies AC-1 bTIdW mount via DashboardMain crisisSupport slot — no rewrite required.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 ContinueOnboardingBanner visibility gate (!profile.results vs onboarding_completed edge case); C-2 ServicesFloatingPanel mobile hidden md:block responsive polish. Accepted: C-3 crisis module re-export architecture aligns with CRISIS-01 brownfield shared component pattern.
